title: Hyperframes Project Config
description: Per-project configuration for a Hyperframes project (hyperframes.json). Tells `hyperframes add` which registry to pull items from and where to drop them in the project tree. Created by `hyperframes init`; users may edit it to point at custom registries or reshape their project layout.

registry.description: Base URL of the registry to pull items from. Point at the official Hyperframes registry or a custom one.

paths.description: Target paths for each item type, relative to the project root.

assets.description: Where asset files (images, fonts, videos) land. Defaults to `assets`.

assetLibraries.description: Reusable local asset libraries that `hyperframes assets` searches before agents create placeholder media.

name.description: Human-readable library name shown in CLI output.

path.description: Absolute path, `~/` path, env-expanded path, or project-relative path to a local asset folder.
